summary: Iteration 63 - P0 Bug Fix AP Payment Testing COMPLETE. All 7 backend tests PASSED. All UI tests PASSED. Bank/Kas dropdown shows 9 accounts (exceeds 5 minimum). All required buttons present. Payment creates balanced journal (Dr. Hutang Dagang / Cr. Kas-Bank).
critical_code_review_comments: accounts_api.py: GET /api/accounts/cash-bank returns 9 cash/bank accounts correctly filtered by sub_type
ap_system.py: POST /api/ap/{id}/payment creates payment and auto-journal with balanced entries
AccountsPayable.jsx: All 7 required buttons implemented with proper data-testid attributes
APPaymentModal.jsx: Bank/Kas dropdown correctly populated from /api/accounts/cash-bank
seed_data_creation: Payment test created: PAY-20260314-0003, PAY-20260314-0004 with journals JV-20260314-0006, JV-20260314-0007
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Bug fully fixed. AP Payment system working with auto-journal. Bank/Kas dropdown shows 9 accounts from /api/accounts/cash-bank endpoint.
